name: Gunstock Ranch
tagline: Horseback rides through the Koolau foothills with mountain and ocean views — pony rides for the little ones.
parking: Free parking on-site at the ranch
hours: Mon–Sat 9am–4pm. Closed Sundays. Rides by reservation only
bestTime: Morning rides for cooler weather and better mountain views before clouds build
kamaaina: Kamaaina rates available — mention when booking
talkStory: Pony rides available for ages 2-6. Regular trail rides for ages 7 and up. The 1-hour scenic ride through pastures with views of the Windward coast is the sweet spot for families. Closed-toe shoes required. The guides are friendly and great with nervous first-timers. Book ahead — they keep groups small. Located near Laie, so pair with a trip to the Polynesian Cultural Center or Hukilau Beach.
